EMAIL 1 - Casual Introduction

Subject: Just joined SeatSafe!

Hi!

I'm Nicole - just set up my SeatSafe account today and wanted to say hello! I have a 2-year-old daughter and I'm excited to use your app to make sure I'm keeping her safe in the car.

I've heard great things about SeatSafe from other parents, so I'm looking forward to trying out the assessment features.

Thanks for making this resource available!

Nicole

---

EMAIL 2 - Friendly Follow-up

Subject: Getting started with the app

Hi SeatSafe team,

Just wanted to follow up - I've been exploring the app features and it looks really user-friendly. I appreciate how clearly everything is explained.

I'll probably be submitting my first car seat assessment soon. Just want to make sure I'm doing everything correctly for my daughter's safety!

Looking forward to using SeatSafe!

Best,
Nicole
